hero.title: Experience India Like Never Before
hero.subtitle: Hit Yatra brings you the most divine and breathtaking journeys across India.

faq.question: How do I book a Hit Yatra package?
faq.answer: You can fill out the inquiry form on any package or contact us directly on our Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/hit_yatra/.

faq.question: Are the prices inclusive of food?
faq.answer: Yes, breakfast is included in all our standard packages. MAP (Modified American Plan) options including dinner are available upon request.

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.text: The Kashi tour organized by Hit Yatra was incredibly peaceful and perfectly managed.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: Excellent service and deep cultural insights. Highly recommend Hit Yatra!
